$description: Index of the Clínica Serrano token system. Tokens are organized in three layers — load them in order. Build pipelines (Style Dictionary, Figma Variables) should consume all three.

layers.name: core
layers.purpose: Raw primitives — color, font, space, radius, motion. No semantic meaning. Edit here to change a foundational value.

layers.name: semantic
layers.purpose: Aliases that give meaning to primitives — surface modes, text roles, wordmark anatomy. Edit here to change what a primitive means in context.

layers.name: components
layers.purpose: Per-component tokens — cta-pill, wordmark-block, bullet-list. Edit here to change how a reusable piece behaves.

layers.name: templates
layers.purpose: Per-template layouts — Instagram canvases, zone anchors, slide structures. Edit here to add a new template or adjust an existing layout.
